dissection.title: Reimagining TPACK for Early Childhood Education: Teachers’ Knowledge, Parental Adaptation, and ICT Integration in Pandemic-Era Play-Based Learning

theory.evidence: deploying the Technological Pedagogical Content Knowledge (TPACK) model

design.evidence: a scoping review of 47 empirical studies

findings.text: ICT integration focused on teacher-initiated guided play, child-initiated free play, and balanced approaches
findings.evidence: ICT integration in play-based pedagogies focused on teacher-initiated guided play, child-initiated free play, and balanced approaches

findings.text: parents’ evolving TPACK influenced children’s engagement, digital literacy, and PL outcomes
findings.evidence: parents’ evolving TPACK influenced children’s engagement, digital literacy, and PL outcomes

notes: The text only provides an abstract, and some facets may not be fully represented.
